What can I do for you?

landing.heroDesc: TheBridgeFlow is the all-in-one solution for students, supervisors and companies. Track, manage and succeed in your internships effortlessly.
landing.popularSub: Discover our most in-demand training programs and launch your career.
landing.aboutTitle: Your partner for a successful career
landing.aboutSub: We guide every student toward excellence with quality training and personalized support.
landing.missionText: Train the next generation of digital professionals with practical, up-to-date skills adapted to real market needs.
landing.visionText: Become the reference in professional training in Tunisia and the MENA region, building strong bridges between learners and companies.
landing.aboutCard1Desc: Certified professionals with years of field experience in top companies.
landing.aboutCard2Desc: Individual follow-up adapted to the pace and needs of each student, from day one to placement.
landing.aboutCard3Desc: Diplomas and certificates valued by recruiters and leading companies in the sector.
landing.aboutCard4Desc: Project-based learning with real-world cases for immediate employability.
landing.whySub: Everything you need to succeed in your digital career.
landing.why1Desc: A dedicated mentor to guide every step of your learning journey.
landing.why2Desc: Learn by building real applications used by companies.
landing.why3Desc: Help with internship search, CV preparation and cover letters.
landing.why4Desc: In-depth knowledge of the needs of Tunisian and international recruiters.
landing.why5Desc: Interview simulations and personalized coaching to land the ideal position.
landing.why6Desc: A certificate valued by employers at the end of your training.
landing.why7Desc: On-site or online, adapt your learning to your own pace.
landing.why8Desc: Evening and weekend classes to combine training with an active life.
landing.why9Desc: Our alumni and partner network stays active long after the course ends.
landing.testiSummerCampSub: What our students say about our trainings.
landing.testiPfeSub: They landed their final-year internship thanks to TheBridgeFlow.
landing.testiFormationSub: The atmosphere and experience of our summer camps, seen by our participants.
landing.techMarqueeSub: A wide range of tools and languages covering development, data and design.
landing.categoriesSub: Click a category to filter our popular trainings.
landing.popularEmptyCategory: No training in this category yet.
landing.screenshotTestiSub: Authentic feedback from our students, week after week.
landing.newsSub: Tips, news and experience feedback to help you move forward.
landing.contactSub: We are available to answer all your questions. Feel free to write to us.
landing.newsletterSub: Subscribe to our newsletter and miss nothing!
landing.footerTagline: The smart platform to manage internships from A to Z.
landing.promoSub: A unique teaching approach, passionate mentors, and a community that propels you toward employment.
landing.promoVideoSub: Discover our method and our training programs

aiAssistant.pageSubtitle: Your smart assistant to succeed in your career
aiAssistant.introLine2: How can I help you today?
aiAssistant.actionsHeading: What can I do for you?
aiAssistant.chatEmptyText: Ask your first question or click an action above
aiAssistant.securityNotice: Your data is secure · SAGE doesn't remember your conversations between sessions
aiAssistant.connectionError: ❌ Connection error. Please try again in a moment.
aiAssistant.insightProfileIncomplete: Profile {{pct}}% complete — finish it to boost your applications.
aiAssistant.insightUploadCV: Upload your CV to apply directly to offers.
aiAssistant.insightStartApplying: Start applying — hundreds of offers are waiting for you!
aiAssistant.actionOffersPrompt: Recommend internship or final-year-project offers suited to my profile. I'm a {{specialty}} student at {{university}}.
aiAssistant.actionAppsPrompt: Summarize the status of my applications and give me advice to improve my chances. I have {{count}} application(s), {{pending}} of which are awaiting a response.
aiAssistant.actionProfilePrompt: Analyze my profile and tell me exactly how to improve it to increase my chances of landing an internship. My profile is currently {{pct}}% complete.
aiAssistant.actionInterviewPrompt: Help me prepare for my internship interview. Give me the 10 most common questions and how to answer them effectively.
aiAssistant.actionFormationsPrompt: Which trainings available on TheBridgeFlow match my specialty ({{specialty}}) and my career goals?
aiAssistant.actionSkillsPrompt: What technical skills and soft skills should I prioritize developing to land an internship in {{specialty}}? Base your answer on current market trends.
